name: Asahimatsu Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Asahimatsu Foods Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells food products in Japan. It offers kori-tofu, dried bean curd products, instant miso soup, and soybean flakes, as well as nursing food products under the Cut Gourmet brand. The company was formerly known as Asahimatsu Dried-Frozen Tofu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Asahimatsu Foods Co., Ltd. in 1983. Asahimatsu Foods Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
